name: l2_powered_source_coupling_blocker_report
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceCouplingBlockerReport expands final powered-source coupling readiness into stable blocker reasons including validation budgets and source-term physical contracts and upstream acceptance-budget blocker messages.
note: Primary blocker report.

name: l2_powered_source_coupling_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceCouplingReadinessGate supplies the final runtime coupling state for each scenario with acceptance-budget blocker provenance.
note: Readiness and blocker-provenance input.

name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit supplies the upstream powered-source API surface and physical-contract blockers consumed by final coupling readiness.
note: Separates global API-surface readiness from policy-level API availability.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_budget_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceBudgetGate supplies acceptance-budget readiness and validation-budget status plus dominant handoff and validation-budget blockers.
note: Acceptance-budget evidence input.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceHandoff supplies hover and cruise validation handoff readiness plus blocker provenance.
note: Handoff readiness input.

name: l2_powered_source_validation_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceValidationErrorBudget supplies hover and cruise validation-budget candidate readiness plus blocker provenance.
note: Validation-budget readiness input.

name: l2_actuator_disk_representation_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskRepresentationPolicy supplies rotor-disk mask and powered-source API policy readiness.
note: Representation policy input.

name: blocker_rule
value: Report runtime coupling as blocked until hover and cruise handoffs are ready validation error budgets are candidates public powered-source API surface and physical source-term contract are ready powered-source API policies are runtime-ready gameplay coupling gates are open and rotor disks remain open rather than solid-filled; diagnostic rows preserve upstream acceptance-budget blocker messages.
